projectDescription: A lightweight ASCII & Unicode 2D graphics library for Windows consoles, providing geometry primitives, a double-buffered renderer, input handling, and frame timing via a clean C++ API.
keyFeatures: Double-buffered console rendering via WriteConsoleOutputW for flicker-free output
Geometry primitives: Point, Line (Bresenham), Box, Circle, and Unicode Text
Built-in ConsoleColor enum and Color utility class for Windows console color attributes
Keyboard input via GetAsyncKeyState with IsKeyPressed, IsKeyReleased, and CheckForUserExit
Mouse tracking with screen-to-console coordinate mapping and click-state detection
Frame timing with TimeManager (GetElapsedTime for delta-time loops)
Global coordinate translation via StateManager with save/restore state support
MathUtils.Map() for linear value scaling and a built-in pi constant
Single-header aggregation via Fazen.h for simple project setup
Minimal external dependencies — only Windows API (windows.h)
publicApiSurface: Point(float x, float y, short color, short character = 0x2588)
Line(float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2, short color, short character = 0x2588)
Box(float x, float y, float width, float height, short color, short character = 0x2588)
Circle(float xc, float yc, float radius, short color, short character = 0x2588)
Text(float x, float y, wstring s, short color)
Text(float x, float y, int b, short color)
enum ConsoleColor: redF, redB, blueF, blueB, greenF, greenB, magentaF, yellowF, whiteF, whiteB, greyF, ...
MathUtils::Map(float value, float x1, float x2, float y1, float y2)
